description_long: This object consists of two identical modern chairs placed side by side, each featuring a minimalist design with straight, clean lines. The chairs have a rectangular seat and backrest, both supported by a thin, tubular metal frame. The backrest is composed of horizontal slats, providing both support and a contemporary aesthetic. Armrests are present on both sides of each chair, seamlessly integrated into the frame. The seat appears to be a solid, flat surface, likely made from a durable material suitable for outdoor use. The overall design suggests these chairs are intended for public or communal urban spaces such as parks, plazas, or outdoor cafes.
description: A pair of modern, metal-framed chairs with horizontal slat backrests and integrated armrests, designed for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both chairs side by side, highlighting the horizontal slat backrests and armrests.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the seat and the tubular frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chairs and the continuation of the slat design.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, emphasizing the armrest and leg structure from the other side.
